creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
Hi,

FreeBSD freezes after trying to play any video file with mplayer or vlc after resume from suspend.

This is Dell Latitude E6400 laptop with Intel X4500 graphics, below are mine dmesg and pciconf output.

vermaden

How-To-Repeat: 1. Boot FreeBSD into X11.
2. Type as root 'zzz' into terminal.
3. Resume the laptop fomr suspend.
4. Play any video file with mplayer or vlc.
